QualityFlags.Enabled: Force throttling Allow half deinterlace Allow scaling

BalancedFlags.Enabled: Force throttling Allow batching Force half deinterlace Force scaling

PowerFlags.Enabled: Force throttling Allow batching Force half deinterlace Force scaling
